case_number: construction is taking place on Plot No.12/6

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4340 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 18056/2025 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of CMA No. 9435/2025 4. For hearing of CMA No. 19183/2024 5. For hearing of main case 03.11.2025 Mr. Rehman Ghani Khattak advocate for the petitioner Ms. Humaira Jatoi advocate for SBCA Ms. Saima Imdad Asstt. A.G Sindh -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The main grievance of the petitioners is that an illegal construction is taking place on Plot No.12/6, B-3 measuring 216 sq. yards, Nazimabad No.3, Karachi. If so advised, the petitioners shall move their complaint under Smart Complaint Redressal Mechanism (SCRM) and once such complaint is received, the SBCA shall decide the same in accordance with law with its own SOPs. Copy of this order shall be sent to DG, SBCA for information and compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
